# Nærings- og fiskeridepartementet

*84 lover*

| Lov | Korttittel | Ikrafttredelse | Historikk |
|-----|-----------|----------------|-----------|
| [Bergverksordning for Svalbard](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1925-08-07.md) | Bergverksordning for Svalbard | 1925-08-14 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1925-08-07.md) |
| [Kongelig Resolution ang. Jorddelingen i Finmarken samt Bopladses Udvisning og Sk](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1775-06-08.md) | Res. anggående jorddelingen i Finmark m.v. |  | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1775-06-08.md) |
| [Lov indeholdende særlige Bestemmelser angaaende Leilændingsgods tilhørende Stamh](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1888-06-23-3.md) | Lov om Leilendingsgods tilhørende Stamhus |  | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1888-06-23-3.md) |
| [Lov om Enhetsregisteret](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1994-06-03-15.md) | Enhetsregisterloven – enhregl | 1995-03-01, 1997-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1994-06-03-15.md) |
| [Lov om Enhetsregisteret (enhetsregisterloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-105.md) | Enhetsregisterloven | 2026-01-01, Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-105.md) |
| [Lov om Foretaksregisteret (foretaksregisterloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-106.md) | Foretaksregisterloven | 2026-01-01, Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-106.md) |
| [Lov om Innovasjon Norge](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2003-12-19-130.md) | Lov om Innovasjon Norge | 2004-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2003-12-19-130.md) |
| [Lov om Norges økonomiske sone [økonomiske soneloven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1976-12-17-91.md) | Økonomiske soneloven – øksonl | 1976-12-17 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1976-12-17-91.md) |
| [Lov om Oppgaveregisteret](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1997-06-06-35.md) | Oppgaveregisterloven – oppgregl | 1997-11-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1997-06-06-35.md) |
| [Lov om Patentstyret og Klagenemnda for industrielle rettar (patentstyrelova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2012-06-22-58.md) | Patentstyrelova | 2013-04-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2012-06-22-58.md) |
| [Lov om adgang til rekvisisjon av skip m.v. under krig eller kriseforhold](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1952-12-19-2.md) | Lov om adgang til rekvisisjon av skip |  | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1952-12-19-2.md) |
| [Lov om aksjeselskaper (aksjeloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1997-06-13-44.md) | Aksjeloven – asl | 1999-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1997-06-13-44.md) |
| [Lov om aktiviteter i verdensrommet (romloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-12-22-128.md) | Romloven | 2026-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2025-12-22-128.md) |
| [Lov om akvakultur (akvakulturloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2005-06-17-79.md) | Akvakulturloven | 2006-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2005-06-17-79.md) |
| [Lov om allmennaksjeselskaper (allmennaksjeloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1997-06-13-45.md) | Allmennaksjeloven – asal | 1999-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1997-06-13-45.md) |
| [Lov om ansvarlige selskaper og kommandittselskaper (Selskapsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1985-06-21-83.md) | Selskapsloven – sel | 1986-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1985-06-21-83.md) |
| [Lov om avgift til forskning og utvikling i fiskeri- og havbruksnæringen](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2000-07-07-68.md) | Lov om eksportavgift på fiskevarer – fiskekspal | 2001-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2000-07-07-68.md) |
| [Lov om beredskapslagring av petroleumsprodukt](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2006-08-18-61.md) | Lov om beredskapslagring av petroleumsprodukt | 2006-08-18 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2006-08-18-61.md) |
| [Lov om besøksbidrag (besøksbidragsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-104.md) | Besøksbidragsloven | Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-104.md) |
| [Lov om det frie varebytte i EØS (EØS-vareloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2013-04-12-13.md) | EØS-vareloven | 2013-04-12 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2013-04-12-13.md) |
| [Lov om endringar i deltakerloven og havressurslova (endringar i kvotesystemet)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2021-03-05-7.md) | Endringslov til deltakerloven og havressurslova | 2022-01-01, Kongen fastset | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2021-03-05-7.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i aksjelovgivningen mv. (åpenhet om eierskap og deltakelse på g](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2021-06-11-84.md) | Endringslov til aksjelovgivningen mv. | 2022-01-01, 2023-07-01, 2025-02-01, Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2021-06-11-84.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i allmenngjøringsloven og petroleumsloven mv. (allmenngjøringsl](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-109.md) | Endringslov til allmenngjøringsloven og petroleumsloven mv. | 2025-07-01, 2026-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-109.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i havressurslova (hjemmel for Fiskeridirektoratet til å beslagl](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-06-29.md) | Endringslov til havressurslova | 2026-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2025-06-06-29.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i lov om god handelsskikk i dagligvarekjeden (tilsynsmyndighet)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-12-22-129.md) | Endringslov til lov om god handelsskikk i dagligvarekjeden | Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2025-12-22-129.md) |
| [Lov om enerett til foretaksnavn og andre forretningskjennetegn mv. (foretaksnavn](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1985-06-21-79.md) | Foretaksnavneloven – ftnavnl | 1988-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1985-06-21-79.md) |
| [Lov om erverv og utvinning av mineralressurser (mineralloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2009-06-19-101.md) | Mineralloven | 2010-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2009-06-19-101.md) |
| [Lov om europeisk meldeplikt for tekniske regler m.m. (EØS-høringsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2004-12-17-101.md) | EØS-høringsloven | 2005-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2004-12-17-101.md) |
| [Lov om europeiske samvirkeforetak (SCE-loven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2006-06-30-50.md) | SCE-loven | 2006-08-18 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2006-06-30-50.md) |
| [Lov om europeiske selskaper (SE-loven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2005-04-01-14.md) | SE-loven | 2005-04-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2005-04-01-14.md) |
| [Lov om europeiske økonomiske foretaksgrupper ved gjennomføring av EØS-avtalens v](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1995-12-22-85.md) | EØFG-loven | 1995-12-22 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1995-12-22-85.md) |
| [Lov om forvaltning av viltlevande marine ressursar (havressurslova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2008-06-06-37.md) | Havressurslova | 2009-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2008-06-06-37.md) |
| [Lov om fri utveksling av tjenesteytelser innen sjøtransport](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1992-12-04-121.md) | Lov om sjøtransporttjenester | 1994-01-01 samtidig med EØS-avtalen | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1992-12-04-121.md) |
| [Lov om fritids- og småbåter (småbåtloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1998-06-26-47.md) | Småbåtloven – småbåtl | 1999-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1998-06-26-47.md) |
| [Lov om fullmakt for Kongen til å forby redere å gi opplysninger m.m. til utenlan](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1967-06-16-3.md) | Lov om forbud mot at redere gir opplysninger | 1967-06-16 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1967-06-16-3.md) |
| [Lov om førstehandsomsetning av viltlevande marine ressursar (fiskesalslagslova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2013-06-21-75.md) | Fiskesalslagslova | 2014-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2013-06-21-75.md) |
| [Lov om gjennomføring og kontroll av EØS-avtalens konkurranseregler mv. (EØS-konk](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2004-03-05-11.md) | EØS-konkurranseloven | 2005-05-19 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2004-03-05-11.md) |
| [Lov om god handelsskikk i dagligvarekjeden](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2020-04-17-29.md) | Lov om god handelsskikk i dagligvarekjeden | 2021-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2020-04-17-29.md) |
| [Lov om handelsverksemd med brukte og kasserte ting (brukthandellova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1999-12-22-105.md) | Brukthandellova – brhll | 2000-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1999-12-22-105.md) |
| [Lov om havner og farvann (havne- og farvannsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2019-06-21-70.md) | Havne- og farvannsloven | 2020-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2019-06-21-70.md) |
| [Lov om heleide dattersamvirkeforetak](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2003-12-12-109.md) | Dattersamvirkeforetaksloven | 2004-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2003-12-12-109.md) |
| [Lov om inngåelse av avtale mellom Kongeriket Norge og Folkerepublikken Kina vedr](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1985-05-03-24.md) | Lov om avtale mellom Norge og Kina | 1985-05-03 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1985-05-03-24.md) |
| [Lov om konkurranse mellom foretak og kontroll med foretakssammenslutninger (konk](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2004-03-05-12.md) | Konkurranseloven – krrl | 2004-05-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2004-03-05-12.md) |
| [Lov om landslott [landslottloven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1930-03-14.md) | Landslottloven | 1930-06-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1930-03-14.md) |
| [Lov om linjekonferanser m.v. [linjekonferanseloven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1984-06-08-55.md) | Linjekonferanseloven | 1985-12-28 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1984-06-08-55.md) |
| [Lov om mesterbrev i håndverk og annen næring [mesterbrevloven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1986-06-20-35.md) | Mesterbrevloven | 1987-01-15 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1986-06-20-35.md) |
| [Lov om midlertidig tilskuddsordning for foretak med stort omsetningsfall etter a](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2020-12-18-156.md) | Lov om midl. tilskudd ved omsetningsfall etter august 2020 | 2020-12-18 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2020-12-18-156.md) |
| [Lov om midlertidig tilskuddsordning for foretak med utgifter til innreisekarante](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2020-12-21-175.md) | Lov om midl. tilskudd for innreisekarantene | 2020-12-21 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2020-12-21-175.md) |
| [Lov om mineralvirksomhet og forvaltning av mineralressurser (mineralloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-107.md) | Mineralloven | 2026-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-107.md) |
| [Lov om målenheter, måling og normaltid](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2007-01-26-4.md) | Lov om målenheter, måling og normaltid | 2008-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2007-01-26-4.md) |
| [Lov om nasjonale saksbehandlingsregler i saker om offentlig støtte (støtteproses](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2022-03-04-7.md) | Støtteprosessloven | 2022-06-22, 2023-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2022-03-04-7.md) |
| [Lov om norsk internasjonalt skipsregister [NIS-loven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1987-06-12-48.md) | NIS-loven – NISl | 1987-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1987-06-12-48.md) |
| [Lov om næringsberedskap (næringsberedskapsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2011-12-16-65.md) | Næringsberedskapsloven | 2012-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2011-12-16-65.md) |
| [Lov om offentlige anskaffelser (anskaffelsesloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2016-06-17-73.md) | Anskaffelsesloven | 2017-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2016-06-17-73.md) |
| [Lov om omdanning av Opplysningsvesenets fond til aksjeselskap](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2024-06-25-58.md) | Lov om omdanning av Opplysningsvesenets fond til aksjeselskap | 2024-06-25, 2025-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2024-06-25-58.md) |
| [Lov om omorganisering av Statkraft SF](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2004-08-27-70.md) | Lov om omorganisering av Statkraft SF | 2004-09-10 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2004-08-27-70.md) |
| [Lov om opphevelse av omstillingslova](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2019-12-13-83.md) | Lov om opphevelse av omstillingslova | 2020-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2019-12-13-83.md) |
| [Lov om oppheving av lov om erverv av næringsverksemd](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2002-06-21-38.md) | Lov om oppheving av ervervsloven mv. | 2002-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2002-06-21-38.md) |
| [Lov om oppløsning av stamhuset Ekeberg](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2005-12-21-129.md) | Lov om oppløsning av stamhuset Ekeberg | 2006-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2005-12-21-129.md) |
| [Lov om oppskyting av gjenstander fra norsk territorium m.m. ut i verdensrommet](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1969-06-13-38.md) | Lov om oppskyting i verdensrommet | 1969-06-13 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1969-06-13-38.md) |
| [Lov om prisregler for jern og stål](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1974-06-07-22.md) | Lov om prisregler for jern og stål | 1974-06-07 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1974-06-07-22.md) |
| [Lov om prisregulering ved import av fisk og fiskevarer m.v.](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1993-06-11-73.md) | Lov om prisregulering ved fiskeimport m.v. | 1993-06-11 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1993-06-11-73.md) |
| [Lov om pristiltak](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1993-06-11-66.md) | Pristiltaksloven – pristl | 1994-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1993-06-11-66.md) |
| [Lov om produksjon, transport og omsetning av agn [agnforsyningsloven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1949-07-08-13.md) | Agnforsyningsloven | 1949-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1949-07-08-13.md) |
| [Lov om prokura [prokuraloven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1985-06-21-80.md) | Prokuraloven – prokl | 1988-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1985-06-21-80.md) |
| [Lov om registrering av foretak (foretaksregisterloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1985-06-21-78.md) | Foretaksregisterloven – fregl | 1988-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1985-06-21-78.md) |
| [Lov om regulering av eksporten av fisk, fiskevarer og marine produkter (fiskeeks](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1990-04-27-9.md) | Fiskeeksportloven – fiskeekspl | 1991-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1990-04-27-9.md) |
| [Lov om retten til å delta i fiske og fangst (deltakerloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1999-03-26-15.md) | Deltakerloven – deltl | 2000-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1999-03-26-15.md) |
| [Lov om røystingsrådgjevarar](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2021-06-18-136.md) | Lov om røystingsrådgjevarar | 2021-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2021-06-18-136.md) |
| [Lov om samvirkeforetak (samvirkelova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2007-06-29-81.md) | Samvirkelova | 2008-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2007-06-29-81.md) |
| [Lov om serveringsvirksomhet (serveringsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1997-06-13-55.md) | Serveringsloven | 1998-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1997-06-13-55.md) |
| [Lov om sikre containere [containerloven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1982-12-17-84.md) | Containerloven | 1984-05-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1982-12-17-84.md) |
| [Lov om skipssikkerhet (skipssikkerhetsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2007-02-16-9.md) | Skipssikkerhetsloven | 2007-07-01, 2008-07-01 (§ 74 nr. 12) | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2007-02-16-9.md) |
| [Lov om stamhuset Rosendal og om forandring i arverettsreglene for stamhuset Jarl](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1927-07-04-11.md) | Stamhusloven | 1927-07-04 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1927-07-04-11.md) |
| [Lov om statleg varekrigsforsikring](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2003-12-12-115.md) | Varekrigsforsikringslova | 2004-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2003-12-12-115.md) |
| [Lov om statlig garantiordning for lån til små og mellomstore bedrifter](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2020-03-27-14.md) | Lov om statlig garantiordning for lån til små og mellomstore bedrifter | 2020-03-27 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2020-03-27-14.md) |
| [Lov om stiftelser (stiftelsesloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2001-06-15-59.md) | Stiftelsesloven – stiftl | 2005-01-01, 2005-04-29, 2005-12-21 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2001-06-15-59.md) |
| [Lov om stillingsvern mv. for arbeidstakere på skip (skipsarbeidsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2013-06-21-102.md) | Skipsarbeidsloven | 2013-08-20, 2014-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2013-06-21-102.md) |
| [Lov om tekniske kontrollorgan som har til oppgåve å gjennomføre samsvarsvurderin](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1994-06-16-20.md) | Lov om tekniske kontrollorgan | 1994-06-16 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1994-06-16-20.md) |
| [Lov om tilskudd til sysselsetting av arbeidstakere til sjøs](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2017-05-22-28.md) | Lov om tilskudd til sysselsetting av arbeidstakere til sjøs | 2017-06-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2017-05-22-28.md) |
| [Lov om tiltak mot diskriminering i internasjonal skipsfart](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1967-07-07-1.md) | Lov om diskriminering i internasj. skipsfart | 1967-07-07 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1967-07-07-1.md) |
| [Lov om tjenestevirksomhet (tjenesteloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2009-06-19-103.md) | Tjenesteloven | 2009-12-28 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2009-06-19-103.md) |
| [Lov om varer av edelt metall mv. [edelmetalloven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2010-09-03-52.md) | Edelmetalloven | 2011-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2010-09-03-52.md) |
| [Lov om vitenskapelig utforskning og undersøkelse etter og utnyttelse av andre un](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1963-06-21-12.md) | Lov om andre undersjøiske naturforekomster | 1963-06-21 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1963-06-21-12.md) |
